reviews.review_msg: He's one of the nicest, most approachable, and kind profs I've had. He speeds through lectures but he will go to great lengths to make sure his students do well. He will always be available for extra time and will sit through any amount of problems to help you. His exams are tricky, but they're fair. HIGHLY recommended, amazing guy!

Rohan is s great guy, but he only shows power point slides, where as it is really hard to follow accounting and calculations if he dosent use a overhead.He also is very vague at explaining the materials. Even the tutorials werent helpful. But Rohan is very helpful in his office hours. also he is prompt to answer questions from emails.
